title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: YouTuber AICodeKing tested a leaked model called Oceanus V1-P (possibly the "Mythos" model) across coding, visual reasoning, and agent tasks. The model scored 70/70 and reportedly outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other competitors on practical tasks including web apps, games, and combinatorics problems.
